'''鈭歞h-k-zh''' ('''dhakazha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mltply|mltply]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-k-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mltply|mltply]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-k-zh
|-
! Lemma
| dhakazha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhakazhithi|dhakazhithi]] || [[word:dhakazhiji|dhakazhiji]] || [[word:dhakazhishi|dhakazhishi]] || [[word:dhakazhi|dhakazhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhakazhuthuth|dhakazhuthuth]] || [[word:dhakazhujuj|dhakazhujuj]] || [[word:dhakazhushush|dhakazhushush]] || [[word:dhakazh|dhakazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhakazhuthu|dhakazhuthu]] || [[word:dhakazhuju|dhakazhuju]] || [[word:dhakazhushu|dhakazhushu]] || [[word:dhakazhu|dhakazhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhakazhufuth|dhakazhufuth]] || [[word:dhakazhufuj|dhakazhufuj]] || [[word:dhakazhufush|dhakazhufush]] || [[word:dhakazhuf|dhakazhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhakazhethe|dhakazhethe]] || [[word:dhakazheje|dhakazheje]] || [[word:dhakazheshe|dhakazheshe]] || [[word:dhakazhe|dhakazhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhakazhothoth|dhakazhothoth]] || [[word:dhakazhojoj|dhakazhojoj]] || [[word:dhakazhoshosh|dhakazhoshosh]] || [[word:dhakazh|dhakazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhakazhotho|dhakazhotho]] || [[word:dhakazhojo|dhakazhojo]] || [[word:dhakazhosho|dhakazhosho]] || [[word:dhakazho|dhakazho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhakazhofoth|dhakazhofoth]] || [[word:dhakazhofoj|dhakazhofoj]] || [[word:dhakazhofosh|dhakazhofosh]] || [[word:dhakazhof|dhakazhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhakazh忙th忙|dhakazh忙th忙]] || [[word:dhakazh忙j忙|dhakazh忙j忙]] || [[word:dhakazh忙sh忙|dhakazh忙sh忙]] || [[word:dhakazh忙|dhakazh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhakazhathath|dhakazhathath]] || [[word:dhakazhajaj|dhakazhajaj]] || [[word:dhakazhashash|dhakazhashash]] || [[word:dhakazh|dhakazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhakazhatha|dhakazhatha]] || [[word:dhakazhaja|dhakazhaja]] || [[word:dhakazhasha|dhakazhasha]] || [[word:dhakazha|dhakazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhakazhafath|dhakazhafath]] || [[word:dhakazhafaj|dhakazhafaj]] || [[word:dhakazhafash|dhakazhafash]] || [[word:dhakazhaf|dhakazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhakazhasha|dhakazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhakazhasha|godhakazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhakazhasha|gokidhakazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhakazhn眉sha|dhakazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhakazhnkn眉sha|godhakazhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhakazhn眉sha|gokidhakazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhakazhsh毛sha|dhakazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhakazhnksh毛sha|godhakazhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhakazhsh毛sha|gokidhakazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhakazhrosha|dhakazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhakazhnkrosha|godhakazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhakazhrosha|gokidhakazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhakazhmusha|dhakazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhakazhnkmusha|godhakazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhakazhmusha|gokidhakazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhakazhsherasha|dhakazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhakazhnksherasha|godhakazhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhakazhsherasha|gokidhakazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhakazhngasha|dhakazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhakazhnkngasha|godhakazhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhakazhngasha|gokidhakazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhakazhyasha|dhakazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhakazhnkyasha|godhakazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhakazhyasha|gokidhakazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhakazhyamasha|dhakazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhakazhnkyamasha|godhakazhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhakazhyamasha|gokidhakazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhakazhn眉sh毛sha|dhakazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhakazhnkn眉sh毛sha|godhakazhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhakazhn眉sh毛sha|gokidhakazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhakazhn眉rosha|dhakazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhakazhnkn眉rosha|godhakazhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhakazhn眉rosha|gokidhakazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhakazhn眉musha|dhakazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhakazhnkn眉musha|godhakazhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhakazhn眉musha|gokidhakazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhakazhsh毛n眉sha|dhakazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhakazhnksh毛n眉sha|godhakazhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhakazhsh毛n眉sha|gokidhakazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhakazhsh毛rosha|dhakazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhakazhnksh毛rosha|godhakazhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhakazhsh毛rosha|gokidhakazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhakazhsh毛musha|dhakazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhakazhnksh毛musha|godhakazhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhakazhsh毛musha|gokidhakazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhakazhron眉sha|dhakazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhakazhnkron眉sha|godhakazhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhakazhron眉sha|gokidhakazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhakazhrosh毛sha|dhakazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhakazhnkrosh毛sha|godhakazhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhakazhrosh毛sha|gokidhakazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhakazhromusha|dhakazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhakazhnkromusha|godhakazhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhakazhromusha|gokidhakazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhakazhmun眉sha|dhakazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhakazhnkmun眉sha|godhakazhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhakazhmun眉sha|gokidhakazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhakazhmush毛sha|dhakazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhakazhnkmush毛sha|godhakazhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhakazhmush毛sha|gokidhakazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhakazhmurosha|dhakazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhakazhnkmurosha|godhakazhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhakazhmurosha|gokidhakazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhakazh|dhakazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dh忙k忙zh|dh忙k忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhakazh|hodhakazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodh忙k忙zh|hodh忙k忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhakazh|hohodhakazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodh忙k忙zh|hohodh忙k忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dhakazh|n眉dhakazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉dh忙k忙zh|n眉dh忙k忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dhakazh|n眉n眉dhakazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dh忙k忙zh|n眉n眉dh忙k忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dhakazh|n茂dhakazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂dh忙k忙zh|n茂dh忙k忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dhakazh|n茂n茂dhakazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dh忙k忙zh|n茂n茂dh忙k忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhakazh|ludhakazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludh忙k忙zh|ludh忙k忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhakazh|luludhakazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludh忙k忙zh|luludh忙k忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhakazh|lidhakazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidh忙k忙zh|lidh忙k忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhakazh|lilidhakazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidh忙k忙zh|lilidh忙k忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhakazh|kodhakazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodh忙k忙zh|kodh忙k忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhakazh|kokodhakazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodh忙k忙zh|kokodh忙k忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhakazh|kedhakazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedh忙k忙zh|kedh忙k忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhakazh|kekedhakazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedh忙k忙zh|kekedh忙k忙zh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
